sql_array: CREATE TABLE limit_by_test (id Int32, val String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, val FROM limit_by_test ORDER BY id, val LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0 BY id;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM limit_by_test GROUP BY id LIMIT 2 BY id;
SELECT id, val FROM limit_by_test ORDER BY val LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 BY val;
